title: Tribe plans community meeting to discuss future charter school
summary: The Kenaitze Indian Tribe is exploring a Dena’ina-focused public charter school, and is looking for feedback from the community. The Tribe will host a Community Interest and Informational Night on Thursday, March 28, from 5:30-7:30 p.m. at the Kahtnuht’ana Duhdeldiht Campus, 12271 Kenai Spur Highway...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 4 March, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 4 March, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
